raw.subject: Something I noticed about McDougall’s Mobile Mechanic
raw.body:
Hi,

Your decades-long experience in San Antonio automotive repair is impressive.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for customers to find you online.

I sketched a page idea that could help: a simple page with an emergency call CTA, a list of your services, and a map to show your service area.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/mcdougall-s-mobile-mechanic-san-antonio

I'd be happy to discuss how a flat fee can help local businesses like yours thrive online. Let's chat soon about your online presence.
